<p>The Army Rocket Force Command conducted the successful training launch of the indigenously developed Fateh-II missile system, the military’s media wing said on Tuesday.</p>

news.summary: Australia’s top diplomat visits China to talk energy security

news.headline: Migrants in hiding as Mauritania pushbacks drastically cut Europe arrivals
news.summary: Following an EU deal, Mauritanian authorities have rounded up and deported thousands of people to Mali and Senegal.
